Anyone who ever believed there was haste on this in nucking futs. Haste items dropping in Runnyeye? LMAO!!! If this was the case, it would be camped around the clock like FBSS's, probably even moreso since the mobs are POOSAES.

# Jul 16 2002 at 3:54 PM Rating: Decent

101 posts
There IS a Haste item dropping in Runny Eye... Called Sporali Gloves.

Good to know what you're talking about before you flame someone, making yourself look like an A$$

No haste
QuoteReply
# Aug 23 2001 at 9:50 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591754747251
15 posts
There is NO HASTE spell with this item. It is a lie. Dont waste your time like I did looking for one, unless you want it strictly for the AC cause thats all its got.
▲ Page top
Untwinked monks... there's a concept!
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2001 at 10:28 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I see what the problem is, someone dared assume that there is such a think as an untwinked monk anymore.

No friends, this is not so, havent you heard that monks now get a FBSS and Fungi Tunic for turning in their no drop note upon character creation?

And then all they do is get a KD off of a decaying skeleton, and a Wu stick off of an armadillo, and they are all set.

I just hope this clears up any confusion.

Oh and remember kids, a monk who doesn't start out with this equipment is playing their class wrong.

Madalen Maindefer
45th level monk of Quellious <--- only character
What could I possibly have been thinking?
▲ Page top
RE: Untwinked monks... there's a concept!
QuoteReply
# Jul 14 2001 at 5:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591754747251
15 posts
I am a lvl 40 monk who is "untwinked" everything I use I have earned, and I would love to have this if it has haste to it. If anyone has any information such as what drops this and if it really procs haste could you please post it.

Shaolen Flyingfists
Bertoxx

have your facts straight
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2001 at 12:10 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
http://eq.castersrealm.com/spells/spell.asp?Id=195

adds 58% to the attack speed of the target. Level 60 Ench spell.

If you're gonna flame someone for flaming, have your facts straight.

For the level you can get this item, its a great waist piece to have for monks. If there were any non-twinks left on any of the servers, they'd probably be happy to have one.

"If there were any non-twinks left on any of the servers..."

biggest "ROFLMAASSOFF!" in human history!

the day when everyone works for their equippement is the day after I get a primal velium battleaxe...
▲ Page top
RE: have your facts straight
QuoteReply
# Jun 07 2001 at 6:26 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Sheesh, have YOUR facts straight! i have a 24 bard soon to be 25 on veeshan who worked for all his stuff. worked, camped, killed. i earned all my stuff! even on all my other characters. except maybe some cloth i got at lvl 3 or so! and personally, twinking is not that bad, it helps people who don't know how to play. luckily, my bard was my like, 5th character. like LostEcko said, there are a few of us who actually EARN what we have!
Gilthalas Dreamweaver
25th bard
tailorer, brewer, jeweler, and i don't care if i spelled anything wrong =)
▲ Page top
RE: have your facts straight
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2001 at 11:55 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I constantly look at posts like this which make my stomach churn. I am old school, worked for everything that I have had and people at one point in time did have to sit there and work for everything they had. Some even lost it a few times. I remember when the scariest thing in EverQuest was making the trip from Freeport to Qeynos, and there was no such thing as Kunark, Velious, Fear, Hate, and Solusek Ro. We all had to exist on the three continents, well with the Hole not being there either, I guess it was mainly two continents, one you could live on for about 20 maybe 30 levels before you migrated to Antonica.

Ah yes, Sorry for you having to hear my old fashioned ramblings, an old Teir`Dal tends to do this when her sanity begins to slip.

-Nalidiae Shadoweaver
Chosen Heretic of Innoruuk
Mithaniel Marr
▲ Page top
RE: have your facts straight
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2001 at 4:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570592821
4 posts
Well, for that non-twink left on any server. I have one. I am a 27th SK who has worked for every piece of Dreadscale, Banded and Cabilis Scale I have. I have nothing that was given to me and well honestly Twinking is pretty cool, just wish I could LoL. But to answer you, there are a few of us who play and actualy EARN what we have and not have people give us everything.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 04 2001 at 4:18 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) actually... there isn't a level 60 enc haste. If you are going to flame somebody, don't make a dumbass out of yourself while doing it. =)
LOL
QuoteReply
# Jun 03 2001 at 8:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247797276
25 posts
To the guy that said FBSS isn't any good, what game did you say you been playing? Cause it isn't EQ thats for sure. Any melee with any idea of what haste does knows you better have FBSS, Hangman's noose, Swirlspine or whatever untill you get a better haste item, nuff said.

If you are 50+ especially, your haste cap is so high that you can now stack FBSS with even the level 60 ench haste and still not be capped, so having all that haste rocks. :)

Alagarn
▲ Page top
No you suck
QuoteReply
# Jun 03 2001 at 5:51 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
did someone say an Fbss sux?..yes there is arnor with better haste but since belts are not a major stat adding slot like rings or chest it is infact a very good item and easy enough to get as thr frenzy mob is only lvl 43 so :P

# Jun 02 2001 at 6:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591753109606
34 posts
This isn't a bloody monk item... well, I guess it is.. but it's a pretty crappy one. :P lol

The thick leather apron is a far better belt, and seriously common. (assuming you dont have an FBSS)

8ac, 1 wt.

1.0wt isn't so bad... especially if you're not wearing a Fungi tunic, and just using your hands. (Like all good monks should. :P)
